About me

Engineering
With Purpose

I'm a software engineer dedicated to writing clean, maintainable, and efficient code. I specialize in building robust backend architectures and seamless frontend experiences where scalability meets elegant performance.

When I'm not coding, I'm diving into system design, contributing to open source projects, or exploring tech meetups.

React Next.js TypeScript Node.js Python System Design SQL & NoSQL Git & CI/CD

What I Do

Services

✦
Brand Strategy

Identity systems, visual language, and brand stories that cut through the noise and stick.

◈
Web Design

Pixels-perfect websites from concept to code. Responsive, fast, and genuinely beautiful.

⬡
Motion & 3D

Scroll animations, WebGL experiences, and micro-interactions that surprise and delight.

◎
Product UX

End-to-end product design from research and wireframes to polished high-fidelity prototypes.

⟡
Development

Clean, maintainable front-end code. React, Next.js, TypeScript — built to scale.

✧
